scripts.check:pilot: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const a=['cases/W-AD-AUTH-001/TC-LOGIN-VALID.yaml','suites/smoke.yaml','scenarios/CMP-01-auth/SC-LOGIN.md','targets/CTR-admin-web.md','catalog/lexicon/testcase-taxonomy.en.txt','catalog/locale.yaml','landscape/CAP-admin.md','templates/TC.example.yaml']; for (const f of a) if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('missing', f); process.exit(1);} console.log('OK_R3_pilot');"
